Our Signature Suites

Every sanctuary is meticulously designed for your ultimate comfort

Popular

Superior Sanctuary

A curated minimalist retreat designed for the modern soul, where sunlight dances through tropical foliage to greet your morning.

📶 Free High-Speed WiFi
🍳 Breakfast Included
☁️ King-size Signature Bedding
Rp 1.250.000 / night

Deluxe Oasis

Immerse yourself in grandeur. Our Deluxe space offers a boundless connection to the horizon, blurring the lines between indoor luxury and outdoor majesty.

📶 Free High-Speed WiFi
🍳 Breakfast Included
🛁 Terrazzo Deep-soak Tub
Rp 2.500.000 / night
Premium

Executive Majesty

The pinnacle of Aetheria. A residence defined by absolute privacy, personalized service, and a private plunge pool that mirrors the sky.

📶 Free High-Speed WiFi
🤵 24/7 Butler Service
🏊‍♀️ Infinity Plunge Pool
Rp 4.800.000 / night

"I've traveled to many luxury resorts, but the serenity here is unmatched. The ritual spa is a must-try!"
